title: How do I find out if I'm eligible for your nonprofit discount?
excerpt: Kindly visit our landing page at monday.com/lp/nonprofits and fill out our short form and our team will review your application as soon as possible, and get back to you with any applicable discounts! We aim to get back t…

posts.author: lrosalanko (Lauren Rosalanko)
posts.cookedHtml: Kindly visit our landing page at monday.com/lp/nonprofits and fill out our short form and our team will review your application as soon as possible, and get back to you with any applicable discounts! We aim to get back to you within 7 days and recommend starting our 14 day free trial while you wait to hear back!

posts.author: msfelton (Amy Hukkinen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Lauren,

See my new topic thread in this forum. We filled the form out at the beginningof February and have nto heard back about Enterprise.

Thanks!
Amy

posts.author: lrosalanko (Lauren Rosalanko)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @msfelton Did you receive our followup email regarding details on Enterprise pricing? I’m curious if it went to spam. Regardless, following up with you via email now!

posts.author: msfelton (Amy Hukkinen)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, we replied back early on in February and then created a support ticket to follow up. I just sent a reply to your email. Thank you!

posts.author: Kentur (Kent)
posts.cookedHtml: Just a headsup that the link in topic is invalid and returns a 404.
